# Explorer's Pack

An Explorer's Pack contains the following items: [[backpack]], [[bedroll]], 2 flasks of [[oil]], 10 days of [[rations]], [[rope]], [[tinderbox]], 10 [[torch|Torches]], and [[waterskin]].
